title: Two workers killed in lift accident
summary: Two construction workers died after a mini lift snapped and fell at a building site in Solar near Erode, triggering safety concerns.

title: Students killed in road accident near Anthiyur
summary: Two Class XII students died and another youth was injured after a truck hit motorcycles near Anthiyur, raising road safety alarms.

title: Heat crosses 40°C in Erode region
summary: Interior districts including Erode recorded temperatures above 40°C, with officials warning of continued heatwave conditions and health precautions.

title: Rain forecast for western Tamil Nadu
summary: Meteorological department predicts rainfall and strong winds in Erode region from April 30, offering relief but warning of possible disruptions.
